mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_email = #{member_email} and login_type=#{login_type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( member_name, member_nickname, member_password, member_email, member_created_at, member_updated_at, member_salt, member_id,login_type) VALUES (#{member_name}, #{member_nickname}, #{member_password}, #{member_email}, NOW(), NOW(), #{member_salt}, #{member_id}, #{login_type})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_nickname = #{member_nickname}, member_password = #{member_password}, member_salt = #{member_salt}, member_updated_at = #{member_updated_at} WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}
UPDATE member SET member_nickname = #{member_nickname}, member_email = #{member_email}, member_name = #{member_name}, member_warning = #{member_warning} WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( login_type, member_nickname, member_email, member_created_at, member_updated_at, member_last_login_at, member_status, member_type, member_warning, ) VALUES ( #{login_type}, #{member_nickname}, #{member_email}, now(), now(), now(), 0, 1, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_last_login_at = NOW() WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE login_type = #{login_type} AND member_email = #{member_email}
SELECT * FROM member WHERE login_type = 'NAVER' AND member_email = #{member_email}
